name: cursor
description: Cursor project with .cursorrules + MemKraft memory structure

files.content:
# Cursor rules for this project

## Memory — MemKraft

This project uses MemKraft (https://pypi.org/project/memkraft/) for durable memory.

Before answering questions about people, orgs, or decisions:
1. Run `memkraft search "<query>"` from the terminal.
2. Check `memory/entities/` for matching files.
3. Check `memory/decisions/` for past rationale.

When the user shares durable information, persist it:
- `memkraft track <name>` for new entities
- `memkraft update <name> --info "..."` to append

Run `memkraft doctor` weekly to check memory health.

## Project
(Describe your project here.)

# memory/

Compound memory for this project, managed by MemKraft.

Quick commands:
```bash
memkraft track "Alice" --type person
memkraft update "Alice" --info "joined as CTO 2026-01"
memkraft search "CTO"
memkraft doctor
```
